log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable with a size of 29635 bytes, and it has been analyzed in four different sandboxes. The tags suggest that it is a spreader with runtime modules and an overlay. I would li

The sample communicates with three different IP addresses on port 443, and it performs DNS lookups for two domains. It also initiates two HTTP conversations to download files from these domains. I wou

The sample drops two files, both of which are executables with the same name 'budha.exe'. They have different SHA256 hashes, suggesting that they are different versions or variations of the same file.
The sample does not attempt to persist on the system through registry changes. I would like to investigate the process activity to understand the behavior of the sample in more detail.
